title: Curver My Style Anthracite Grey 55L Laundry Basket Hamper with Lid 43cm (W) x 33cm (D) x 60cm (H)
features: Stylish Laundry Storage – 55L capacity laundry hamper with elegant flat rattan effect, ideal for keeping laundry organised in bathrooms, bedrooms, or utility rooms.
Modern Dark Grey Finish – Sophisticated colour blends seamlessly into contemporary interiors while adding a neat, decorative touch.
Durable & Lightweight – Made from strong plastic that’s easy to clean and built to last, offering long-term use with minimal maintenance
Convenient Features – Includes integrated carry handles for easy lifting and a hinged lid for discreet and effortless access.
Compact Yet Spacious – External dimensions: 43cm (L) x 33cm (W) x 60cm (H), making it suitable for small spaces without compromising capacity.
